title: Critical Mass Development Intern Interview Questions & Practice
metaDescription: Ace your Critical Mass Development Intern interview with AI-powered practice questions and feedback. Get ready for your Chicago, IL internship.
content:
# Critical Mass Development Intern Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Critical Mass Development Intern internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Chicago, IL
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Critical Mass
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Critical Mass is offering a Development Intern internship position in Chicago, IL. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Critical Mass's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Critical Mass interview and increase your chances of success.
